Bash(DOTFILES="/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles" DOTFILES_MACHINE=ibotta zsh -c '
echo "=== File existence checks for DOTFILES_MACHINE=ibotta ==="

files=\(
  "$DOTFILES/shell/init.zsh"
  "$DOTFILES/shell/path.zsh"
  "$DOTFILES/shell/dots.zsh"
\)
for f in "${files[@]}"; do
  [[ -f "$f" ]] && echo "OK: $f" || echo "MISSING: $f"
done

for f in "$DOTFILES/modules/"*.zsh\(N\); do
  echo "OK module: ${f:t}"
done

mdir="$DOTFILES/machines/ibotta"
for f in init.zsh path.zsh aliases.zsh; do
  [[ -f "$mdir/$f" ]] && echo "OK ibotta/$f" || echo "MISSING ibotta/$f"
done
for f in "$mdir/modules/"*.zsh\(N\); do
  echo "OK ibotta/module: ${f:t}"
done
' 2>&1)
Bash(DOTFILES=/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles DOTFILES_MACHINE=unknown zsh -c 'source shell/dots.zsh && dots --search purge')
Bash(DOTFILES=/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles DOTFILES_MACHINE=unknown zsh -c 'source shell/dots.zsh && dots --search docker')
Bash(DOTFILES=/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles DOTFILES_MACHINE=unknown zsh -c 'source shell/dots.zsh && dots --search weather')
Bash(DOTFILES=/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles DOTFILES_MACHINE=ibotta zsh -c 'source shell/dots.zsh && dots --search deploy')
Bash(DOTFILES=/Users/cole/repos/dotfiles DOTFILES_MACHINE=ibotta zsh -c 'source shell/dots.zsh && dots --search purge && dots --search docker && dots --search weather')
